response.justification: Strong, versatile full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and solid TypeScript/Node and AWS CDK background. However, the role's core requirement — 8+ years building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions — is not demonstrated; the candidate's AI-specific work appears to begin only in 2025. Key technical pillars (RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks, Python) are largely absent or unproven. A conversation could clarify the depth of recent AI work, but on paper this is a partial match for a staff-level GenAI specialist role.
strengths: Extensive engineering breadth across web, backend, mobile, and embedded with strong testing/TDD discipline
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, plus AWS CDK cloud experience
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring via workshops, courses, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: Does not meet the 8+ years of production AI/GenAI experience the role requires
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks, or Python in the skill set
Customer-facing technical discovery and enterprise delivery experience is not clearly shown

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and recent agentic tooling work
